name: Introduction to Microsoft 365 Copilot
description:
Wondering how to actually get started with Microsoft 365 Copilot and drive real adoption across your organization? This LIVE webinar answers common questions around what Copilot is, how it works, and how teams can begin using AI effectively in their daily workflows.

**[Click Here to register for FREE](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/mst365-copilot-adoption-webinar?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**
**DATE:** April 27, 2026
**TIME:** 12 PM- 1PM EST
Explore practical use cases, key features, and simple strategies to help you understand where Copilot adds value from automating tasks to improving productivity across apps like Word, Excel, Outlook, and Teams.

**What you will learn:**

* What Copilot is (and isn’t): where it helps, where humans stay responsible
* **Security & trust basics:** data boundaries, permissions matter, “don’t paste secrets” rules
* **Free vs. paid:** what’s available in each and what value changes with paid seats
* “Art of the Possible” demos: 3–5 quick use cases across common roles
* Adoption path: what users do next (Phase 1 workshop or Phase 2 N+ path)

**Seats are limited - [Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/mst365-copilot-adoption-webinar?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)!**

name: How Automation & Wireless Are Transforming Enterprise Networks
description:
Enterprise networks are becoming harder to manage as scale, security, and performance demands continue to rise.
*Manual processes and traditional approaches are no longer enough to keep up.*

**The shift toward automation and modern wireless is no longer optional—it’s essential.**

👉 This is exactly why we’re hosting this complimentary live session **- ["Learn How Cisco Automation & Wireless Transform Enterprise Networks"](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/scaling_enterprise_networks_automation_and_wireless_with_cisco?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)**
**Register now to secure your spot - [Link](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/scaling_enterprise_networks_automation_and_wireless_with_cisco?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)**

In this session, we’ll explore how automation and wireless technologies are transforming enterprise networks and helping organizations build scalable, efficient, and high-performing infrastructure.

You’ll gain a high-level understanding of how modern network environments are evolving, how Cisco technologies are enabling this transformation, and how these trends are shaping the skills required across networking, cybersecurity, cloud, and IT domains.

Event Details-
📅 Duration: 40–45 Minutes
🎓 Complimentary Live Webinar

**Why You Should Attend -**

* Stay ahead of evolving enterprise networking trends
* Understand practical approaches to scaling modern networks
* Explore in-demand skills for career growth
* Gain insights into real-world network transformation strategies

name: Agentic AI on Vertex: Unlock self-learning AI with Vertex AI
description:
As AI rapidly evolves, organizations are moving beyond static models toward **agentic systems** that can independently plan, make decisions, and take actions.

This masterclass, *“****[Agentic AI on Vertex: Unlock Self-Learning AI with Vertex AI,](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/agentic-ai-on-vertex-unlock-self-learning-ai-with-vertex-ai?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=shubhra)****”* dives into how Google Cloud Vertex AI empowers enterprises to design, deploy, and scale intelligent AI agents.
You’ll gain insights into how these agents leverage large language models, orchestration frameworks, and real-time data to solve complex business challenges, from automation and customer engagement to cybersecurity and operations.

Whether you're exploring AI adoption or scaling existing initiatives, this session will equip you with the knowledge to build impactful, future-ready AI systems.
